recent.statement: The VIX fear gauge will increase by more than 5% within the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: The final snapshot shows VIX down 8.26%, not up more than 5%, and all archived signals show declines.

recent.statement: EIA weekly petroleum status report will move CL=F by +2.5% in the next 24h
recent.evidence: S1 shows the EIA report was merely scheduled for 2026-07-22 (after the window closed 2026-07-21) and no signal shows any +2.5% move in CL=F.

recent.statement: The price of Natural Gas (Henry Hub) will fall by at least 2% in the next 24 hours.
recent.evidence: Henry Hub natural gas is up +0.31% at 2.87 $/MMBtu, not down 2%.

recent.statement: The price of Natural Gas (Henry Hub) will decrease by more than 2% in the next 24 hours.
recent.evidence: The only Henry Hub natural gas signal shows +0.31%, not a decrease exceeding 2%.

recent.statement: Natural Gas (Henry Hub) price will drop by 3% within the next 24 hours
recent.evidence: No signal reports Henry Hub natural gas prices; the archived signals cover only crude oil, equities, VIX, and FOMC dates, none showing a 3% natural gas drop.

recent.statement: The EIA weekly petroleum status report will move CL=F by at least 1% in the next 24 hours.
recent.evidence: S1 shows the EIA petroleum report was still scheduled for 2026-07-22, after the window closed, and no signal shows any 1% move in CL=F occurred.

recent.statement: The price of WTI Crude Oil will increase by more than 1% in the next 24 hours.
recent.evidence: No signal reports WTI Crude Oil's price change; S12 shows Brent (a different benchmark) up 2.19%, which cannot confirm the WTI-specific >1% threshold.

recent.statement: The price of WTI Crude Oil will rise by at least $1.50 per barrel
recent.evidence: No signal reports WTI Crude Oil's price change; only Brent (+1.88%) is shown, which is a different subject and cannot confirm a $1.50 WTI rise.

recent.statement: WTI Crude Oil price will drop by at least $1.50
recent.evidence: WTI rose to 84.33 (+1.32%) by window close rather than dropping $1.50, so the forecast did not occur.

recent.statement: The US stock market will experience a moderate decline
recent.evidence: S&P 500 futures rose +0.4% (and Nasdaq +1.33%, VIX -4.34%), showing gains rather than the forecast moderate decline.

recent.statement: WTI Crude Oil will drop below $78/bbl
recent.evidence: WTI never fell below $78, with the latest snapshot at $83.83 and all windowed readings ranging 81.84–83.94.

recent.statement: The VIX fear gauge will rise above 20
recent.evidence: The latest VIX reading is 17.69, well below the 20 threshold, and all signals show values between 17.51 and 17.74, never exceeding 20.
